customer_query: How do I return a product?
assistant_response: You may return eligible products within 30 calendar days of delivery if they are unused, unwashed, in their original packaging, and accompanied by proof of purchase.

customer_query: Can I return an opened hygiene product?

context.policy_rule: Opened hygiene and personal care products are not returnable

assistant_response: I’m sorry, but opened hygiene products are not eligible for return under EcoMarket’s policy. If the item arrived defective or incorrect, please contact support with your order number.

customer_query: Can I return a perishable item?
assistant_response: Perishable goods are generally not eligible for return unless they arrive damaged or spoiled. If that happened, please provide photos and your order number within the required reporting window.

customer_query: What if my product arrived damaged?
assistant_response: I’m sorry your product arrived damaged. Please report the issue within 48 hours of delivery and include photos plus your order number so support can review the case.

customer_query: When will I receive my refund?

context.shipping_fees: non-refundable unless EcoMarket made an error

assistant_response: Once the returned item is received and inspected, refunds are typically processed within 5–10 business days to the original payment method.

customer_query: How long does shipping take?
assistant_response: Standard shipping usually takes 3–7 business days. Express shipping usually takes 1–3 business days, and same-day delivery is available only in select locations.

customer_query: Do you ship internationally?

context.additional_costs: customs duties and import taxes may apply

assistant_response: Yes, EcoMarket ships internationally. Please note that customs duties, import taxes, or local fees may apply and are the customer’s responsibility.

customer_query: Why is my delivery late?
assistant_response: Delivery delays may occur due to weather conditions, carrier issues, high demand, or regional logistics constraints. Please check your tracking link for the latest status.

customer_query: Is shipping free?

context.free_shipping: may apply above a defined order threshold

assistant_response: Free shipping may apply when an order exceeds the required threshold. Shipping fees can vary depending on location, order size, and delivery method.

customer_query: What happens if delivery fails?
assistant_response: If delivery fails because of an incorrect address or because the customer was unavailable, additional shipping fees may apply.
